violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of and machine was actively being cleaned during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
Faucet handle for handwashing sink in the men's restroom was in poor repair. Equipment to be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025
The floors behind the bar were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2025
